title: Theme Studies
description: Three independent studies for the Ambigram Readability theme.
creative_direction: A first-pass single-image package for Ambigram Readability: one core demonstration, one applied system, and one gallery-oriented variation, all focused on controlled in-image text and typography, optical-illusion geometry and precise perspective.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.
